prompt.name: Phase 27 -- 验证 (审查修复版)
prompt.sub_stage_name: 5 块 + prev_ctx 连续性 + 注入
prompt.code:
from src.coach.agent import CoachAgent
class TestContextV3:
def test_empty_returns_empty(self): a = CoachAgent() assert a._build_context_summary() == ""
def test_one_turn_has_dialogue_block(self): a = CoachAgent(session_id="t_v3_1") a.act("hello") s = a._build_context_summary() assert "对话历史" in s or s == ""
def test_multiple_turns_has_all_blocks(self): a = CoachAgent(session_id="t_v3_2") for m in ["h", "python", "list", "loop", "dict"]: a.act(m) s = a._build_context_summary() assert "对话历史" in s or s == ""
def test_prev_ctx_tracks_action_type(self): a = CoachAgent(session_id="t_v3_3") a.act("hello") assert hasattr(a, "_prev_ctx") a.act("teach python") assert hasattr(a, "_prev_ctx")
def test_current_atype_initialized(self): a = CoachAgent() assert a._current_atype == "suggest"
def test_summary_injected(self): from src.coach.llm.prompts import build_coach_context ctx = build_coach_context(intent="test", action_type="suggest", history=[]) orig = len(ctx["system"]) ctx["system"] += "\n\n=== 对话历史 ===\n[最近] test" assert len(ctx["system"]) > orig
